debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
w : ℕ
args : Vector (ZMod p) w
e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)
cs : Clap.Cs p (ZMod p)
h : e.eval ≠ Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args
⊢ (if Exp.eval (Clap.bits2num_e p inst✝ (ZMod p) w args) - e.eval = 0 then Clap.Cs.eval p inst✝ cs else denotation.n) =
    denotation.n

failed_attempts:
have h' : (bits2num_e args).eval - e.eval ≠ 0 := by
    intro heq
    apply h
    have : (bits2num_e args).eval = e.eval := by linarith
    unfold bits2num_e bits2num Vector.foldl at this ⊢
    generalize h_eq : Exp.c (0 : ZMod p) = v
    have hv : (0 : ZMod p) = v.eval := by rw [←h_eq, Exp.eval]
    conv at this => lhs; rw [hv]
    clear h_eq hv
    revert v
    induction w with
    | zero =>
      have : args = #v[] := by simp
      simp [this]
    | succ w ih =>
      intro v hv
      have : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
        simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]
        ext i h
        match i with
        | .zero => simp; rfl
        | .succ i => simp [add_comm]
      simp only [Nat.add_one_sub_one, Vector.tail_eq_cast_extract, Vector.insertIdx_zero] at this
      rw [this]
      simp only [Vector.toArray_extract, Array.size_extract, Vector.size_toArray, min_self,
        add_tsub_cancel_right]
      simp only [Vector.toArray_cast, Vector.toArray_append, Vector.toArray_extract,
        Array.size_append, List.size_toArray, List.length_cons, List.length_nil, zero_add,
        Array.size_extract, Vector.size_toArray, min_self, add_tsub_cancel_right,
        Array.foldl_append', List.foldl_toArray', List.foldl_cons, List.foldl_nil] at hv
      have : args.toArray.extract 1 (w + 1) = (args.extract 1 (w + 1)).toArray := by rfl
      rw [this] at hv
      have hww : min (w + 1) (w + 1) - 1 = w := by simp
      rw [←hww] at ih
      specialize @ih (args.extract 1)
      simp only [Vector.toArray_extract, Array.size_extract, Vector.size_toArray, min_self,
        add_tsub_cancel_right] at ih
      specialize ih (Exp.v args.head + Exp.c 2 * v)
      simp only [Exp.eval, mul_comm] at ih
      exact ih hv
  simp [h']

have h' : (bits2num_e args).eval - e.eval ≠ 0 := by
    intro heq
    apply h
    unfold bits2num_e bits2num Vector.foldl at heq ⊢
    have : (Array.foldl (fun acc b => Exp.v b + Exp.c 2 * acc) (Exp.c 0) args.toArray).eval =
           Array.foldl (fun acc b => b + 2 * acc) 0 args.toArray := by
      generalize hv : Exp.c (0 : ZMod p) = v
      have hv' : v.eval = 0 := by rw [←hv]; rfl
      revert v
      induction args.toArray.toList with
      | nil =>
        intros v hv'
        simp [hv']
      | cons x xs ih =>
        intros v hv'
        simp only [List.foldl_cons]
        have : (Exp.v x + Exp.c 2 * v).eval = x + 2 * v.eval := by simp [Exp.eval]
        rw [this, hv']
        apply ih
        ring
    rw [sub_eq_zero] at heq
    rw [this] at heq
    exact heq.symm
  simp [h']

have h' : (bits2num_e args).eval - e.eval ≠ 0 := by
    intro heq
    apply h
    unfold bits2num_e bits2num Vector.foldl at heq ⊢
    have : (Array.foldl (fun acc b => Exp.v b + Exp.c 2 * acc) (Exp.c 0) args.toArray).eval =
           Array.foldl (fun acc b => b + 2 * acc) 0 args.toArray := by
      generalize hv : Exp.c (0 : ZMod p) = v
      have hv' : v.eval = 0 := by rw [←hv]; rfl
      revert v
      induction args.toArray.toList with
      | nil =>
        intros v hv'
        simp [Array.foldl_eq_foldl_toList, hv']
      | cons x xs ih =>
        intros v hv'
        simp only [Array.foldl_eq_foldl_toList, List.foldl_cons]
        have : (Exp.v x + Exp.c 2 * v).eval = x + 2 * v.eval := by simp [Exp.eval]
        rw [hv'] at this
        simp only [mul_zero, add_zero] at this
        specialize @ih (Exp.v x + Exp.c 2 * v) this
        convert ih using 2
        · simp [Exp.eval, hv']
    rw [this] at heq
    linarith [sub_eq_zero.mp heq]
  simp [h']

    simp only [sub_eq_zero] at heq
    rw [this] at heq
    exact heq.symm
  simp only [sub_eq_zero] at h' ⊢
  simp only [ite_eq_right_iff]
  intro heq
  exact absurd heq h'

have h' : (bits2num_e args).eval - e.eval ≠ 0 := by
    intro heq
    apply h
    unfold bits2num_e bits2num Vector.foldl at heq ⊢
    have : (Array.foldl (fun acc b => Exp.v b + Exp.c 2 * acc) (Exp.c 0) args.toArray).eval =
           Array.foldl (fun acc b => b + 2 * acc) 0 args.toArray := by
      generalize hv : (Exp.c (0 : ZMod p)) = v
      generalize hz : (0 : ZMod p) = z
      have heval : v.eval = z := by simp [←hv, ←hz, Exp.eval]
      clear hv hz
      revert v z
      induction args.toArray.toList with
      | nil =>
        intros v z heval
        simp [heval]
      | cons x xs ih =>
        intros v z heval
        simp only [List.foldl_cons]
        apply ih
        simp [Exp.eval, heval]
    simp at this
    rw [sub_eq_zero] at heq
    rw [this] at heq
    exact heq.symm
  simp [h']

        have : (Exp.v x + Exp.c 2 * v).eval = x + 2 * v.eval := by simp [Exp.eval]
        rw [hv'] at this
        simp only [mul_zero, add_zero] at this
        have ih' := @ih (Exp.v x + Exp.c 2 * v) this
        convert ih' using 2
        · simp [Array.foldl_eq_foldl_toList]
        · simp [hv', Array.foldl_eq_foldl_toList]
    rw [sub_eq_zero] at heq
    rw [this] at heq

have h_bits2num_e : (bits2num_e args).eval = bits2num args := by
    unfold bits2num_e bits2num Vector.foldl
    generalize h_eq : Exp.c (0 : ZMod p) = v
    have : 0 = v.eval := by rw [←h_eq, Exp.eval]
    rw [this]
    clear h_eq this
    revert v
    induction w with
    | zero =>
      have : args = #v[] := by simp
      simp [this]
    | succ w ih =>
      intro v
      have : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
        simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]
        ext i hi
        match i with
        | .zero => simp; rfl
        | .succ i => simp [add_comm]
      simp only [Nat.add_one_sub_one, Vector.tail_eq_cast_extract, Vector.insertIdx_zero] at this
      rw [this]
      have hmin : min (w + 1) (w + 1) - 1 = w := by simp
      rw [←hmin] at ih
      specialize @ih (args.extract 1) (Exp.v args.head + Exp.c 2 * v)
      simp only [Vector.toArray_extract, Array.size_extract, Vector.size_toArray, min_self,
        add_tsub_cancel_right] at ih
      simp [ih, Exp.eval]
  simp only [h_bits2num_e]
  have : bits2num args - e.eval ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero_of_ne (Ne.symm h)
  simp [this]

           Array.foldl (fun acc b => b + 2 * acc) 0 args.toArray := by
      generalize hv : Exp.c (0 : ZMod p) = v
      have hv' : v.eval = 0 := by rw [←hv]; simp [Exp.eval]
      revert v
      induction args.toArray.toList with
      | nil =>
        intros v hv'
        simp [hv']
      | cons x xs ih =>
        intros v hv'
        simp only [List.foldl_cons]
        have : (Exp.v x + Exp.c 2 * v).eval = x + 2 * v.eval := by simp [Exp.eval]
        rw [hv'] at this
        apply ih
        simp [Exp.eval, hv']
    rw [sub_eq_zero] at heq
    exact heq
  simp [h']

have h' : (bits2num_e args).eval - e.eval ≠ 0 := by
    intro heq
    apply h
    have : (bits2num_e args).eval = e.eval := by linarith
    unfold bits2num_e bits2num Vector.foldl at this ⊢
    generalize h_eq : Exp.c (0 : ZMod p) = v
    have hv : v.eval = 0 := by rw [←h_eq]; rfl
    clear h_eq
    revert v
    induction w with
    | zero =>
      intro v hv
      have : args = #v[] := by simp
      simp [this, Exp.eval] at hv ⊢
      exact hv.symm
    | succ w ih =>
      intro v hv this
      have hargs : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
        simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]
        ext i h
        match i with
        | .zero => simp; rfl
        | .succ i => simp [add_comm]
      simp only [Nat.add_one_sub_one, Vector.tail_eq_cast_extract, Vector.insertIdx_zero] at hargs
      rw [hargs] at this ⊢
      simp only [Vector.toArray_cast, Vector.toArray_append, Vector.toArray_extract,
        Array.size_append, List.size_toArray, List.length_cons, List.length_nil, zero_add,
        Array.size_extract, Vector.size_toArray, min_self, add_tsub_cancel_right,
        Array.foldl_append', List.foldl_toArray', List.foldl_cons, List.foldl_nil] at this ⊢
      have hmin : min (w + 1) (w + 1) - 1 = w := by simp
      rw [←hmin] at ih
      specialize @ih (args.extract 1) (Exp.v args.head + Exp.c 2 * v)
      simp only [Exp.eval, hv, mul_zero, add_zero] at ih
      have : args.toArray.extract 1 (w + 1) = (args.extract 1).toArray := rfl
      rw [this] at ih ⊢
      exact ih this
  simp [h']

        convert ih using 2

    rw [this] at heq
    linarith [sub_eq_zero.mp heq]
  simp [h']

    intro heq

      unfold bits2num_e bits2num Vector.foldl

          simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]
          ext i h
          match i with
